prod.name: Negative - Manager as pronoun 'my manager' English @negative @validation @english
prod.notes: prompt_hint explicitly blocks 'my manager' — must be a real person name. Tests server-side validation rule. Key D1 evidence for field validation.

prod.name: Negative - Manager as pronoun 'him' English @negative @validation @english
prod.notes: User says 'him' as manager name. Must be rejected — only real person names accepted.
prod.initialRequest: I want leave. Alice, Engineering, manager is him

prod.name: Negative - Manager as 'boss' English @negative @validation @english
prod.notes: User provides a role title instead of a name. AI must reject and ask for actual person name.

prod.name: Negative - Manager as pronoun Arabic @negative @validation @arabic
